narrative:
Cols 71-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,734 registered voters, with 68.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
